sleepTargets.label: Day rhythm
sleepTargets.notes: Offer sleep after 45-60 min awake and expect frequent short naps.

sleepTargets.label: Wake windows
sleepTargets.notes: Follow sleepy cues and reset quickly after overtired stretches.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: Aim for a calm feed, dim lights, and an early bedtime when needed.

feedTargets.label: Day feeds
feedTargets.notes: Feed on demand and watch for hunger cues between naps.

feedTargets.label: Evening top-up
feedTargets.notes: Cluster feeding can be normal in this stage.

feedTargets.label: Night feeds
feedTargets.notes: Night feeds are still expected for most babies this young.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
